title: onagra biennis var. cruciata
intro: Onagra biennis var. cruciata, also known as the cross-bearing evening primrose, is a variant of the evening primrose plant, which is a type of flowering plant in the family Onagraceae. The medicinal properties of Onagra biennis var. cruciata include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds and skin conditions such as eczema and acne. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve skin health, and support immune function, making it a popular natural remedy for various health issues. Herbal preparations of Onagra biennis var. cruciata include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used topically or taken internally to reap its medicinal benefits.
